name: Pesuso Martial Arts Academy Pattaya
nameThai: พีสุโซ มาร์เชียลอาร์ต อะคาเดมี พัทยา
addressFull: Taekwondo room, 2nd floor, Lotus's North Pattaya, 221/19 Moo 5, Na Kluea, Bang Lamung, Chon Buri 20150
hours: Current class timetable should be confirmed; the 24-hour map label is not treated as a literal coached-class schedule

federation.evidence: The current operator says training follows international taekwondo standards, and the team competes in national championship systems. Neither statement establishes a named federation membership or grading portability.

coaches: Master Joe (Thanarit Piyamethinrut), founder; operator reports more than 20 years of teaching experience

praise: Recent Thai parents repeatedly praise patient, individualised teaching that does not pressure children.

sources.label: Current operator history, address and programme
Google Maps current Lotus North Pattaya listing and reviews
Thai Department of Business Development franchise profile

confidenceReason: The relocated academy is current and independently corroborated, but every price plus federation/grading and English-instruction fields remain missing.
relocationNote: The ledger's Chaiyaphruek identity resolves to the same academy now operating at Lotus's North Pattaya. No former-location rating, hours, price or facilities were transferred.
